title: Built this AI trading thing for myself – curious what you think
author: DavidBegDev
selftext:
**Hi, my name is David.**



I've been programming this little side project for a few months now.



It analyzes charts, indicators, and patterns, helping me automatically test and improve strategies instead of doing everything manually like many others, including the internet. You have to write safely because Redit bans you, haha.



I'd love to hear your opinions and ideas. Do you think I have potential?

comments.author: Legitimate_Row7803
comments.body: Are you using openai 's API to retrieve title information? Can you send me the project link?

replies.author: DavidBegDev
replies.body: OPENAI have somethink for free? Hahaha i don’t have any links to project, just files on my pc

comments.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
comments.body:
Hey, I have my own profitable ML-based trading model for BTC. I’ve tested it on about 5 years of data and it averaged roughly around 10% per month with fixed lot. And it has a sharpe ratio of >3.  
I don’t have much capital myself, so I’m looking for really genuine people who might be interested to buying it  
Also I have been live trading it since September and my model is UP by 55%, where BTC is down by 46% now)  
If this is something one is interested in let me know.  
Here is the report I have prepared on my model on the basis of past 4 years of data- [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive_link)

comments.author: FxingMyLife
comments.body: Looks cool. No idea what it's doing! Is it profitable

replies.author: DavidBegDev
replies.body: This is my personal AI project that has access to the internet, data from every stock exchange and cryptocurrency, analyzes everything you tell it and generates investment strategies on demand depending on the user's requirements :) Of course, all within a poor financial range, if I had the money, I would have expanded it 5 times a long time ago 😏
